body: WHERE IS MY PACKAGE?? I WILL SUE YOUR COMPANY!! This is FRAUD!! I'm going to report you to the BBB, the FTC, and every review site I can find!! I want to speak to your CEO RIGHT NOW!! My order ORD-33201 was supposed to arrive yesterday and tracking shows it's still in transit. THIS IS THE WORST COMPANY I HAVE EVER DEALT WITH!!!

expected.notes: Low-stakes tracking inquiry ($25, standard tier, 1-day delay) using extreme language to game escalation. Tests whether hybrid scoring correctly weighs objective factors over emotional language.
